title: Full cloud infrastructure design
prompt: Design the cloud infrastructure for our new e-commerce platform on AWS
expected_behavior: Produces all 7 sections: network topology (VPC with public/private/protected subnets), compute strategy, storage architecture, HA/DR with multi-AZ, IAM model, cloud landing zone, and cost optimization.

title: Kubernetes platform architecture
prompt: Plan a Kubernetes platform for our microservices with auto-scaling and HA
expected_behavior: Covers EKS/GKE/AKS control plane, worker node auto-scaling, ingress, namespace strategy, resource limits, and multi-AZ deployment for HA.

title: Multi-cloud complexity
prompt: We need infrastructure spanning AWS and Azure with consistent governance
expected_behavior: Addresses multi-cloud complexity: abstraction layer (Kubernetes), consistent tagging strategy, multi-cloud governance, no unified API caveat, Transit Gateway / ExpressRoute interconnect.

title: Startup with limited budget
prompt: Design infrastructure for our startup — we have almost no budget but need to scale
expected_behavior: Recommends serverless where possible, auto-scaling, spot instances for batch, avoids reserved instances initially, emphasizes FinOps from day one.

title: False positive — application code architecture
prompt: Design the internal module structure and dependency injection for our Java backend
expected_behavior: Does NOT activate this skill. Recognizes this is software architecture (internal code structure), not infrastructure. Defers to software-architecture skill.
